violations.text: (Beverages) were observed stored on the floor in the (throughout the establishment). Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 02/03/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the (retail food storage shelves ) have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and/or rodent droppings. New Violation. Correct By: 02/03/2025

The (walls ) in the (retail ) area is in poor repair. Observed exposed dry wall and paint chipping and peeling. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/17/2025

The floors throughout the facility including walk in cooler have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 02/03/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the (being stored in the 3bay sink and mop sink ) area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 02/10/2025
The Person in charge did not assure compliance with critical code requirements. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/14/2024
Inspector observed various gnawed and/or droppings on food product. See disposal form. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/14/2024

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by gnawed food product, droppings on food storage shelves, and floors throughout establishment. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/14/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the retail food storage shelves have an accumulation of dust, dirt, and/or rodent droppings. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/14/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the outside dumpster area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/14/2024
The Person in charge did not assure compliance with critical code requirements. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2024

Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2024

The following non food contact surfaces observed with debris: 1.retail shelves and under kick plates observed with droppings, dust , and soil residue. 2.shelves in beverage cooler and walk in cooler observed with biofilm and and soil residue. 3.fans in walk in cooler observed with dust. Non food contact surfaces shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/29/2024
